## Skill Submission

- Name: <!-- required -->
- Slug: <!-- required; kebab-case -->
- Category: skills
- GitHub URL: <!-- optional -->
- Docs URL: <!-- optional -->
- Download URL (if any): <!-- optional -->
- Author: <!-- optional -->
- Contact email: <!-- required -->
- Tags (comma-separated): <!-- optional -->

## Required Fields

- Description (1-3 sentences): <!-- required -->
- Card description (short preview): <!-- required -->
- Install command: <!-- required unless download URL handles install -->
- Usage snippet: <!-- required -->

## Strongly Recommended Fields

- Copy snippet (full usable asset):
- Config snippet:

## Validation Notes

- If using download URL, include a practical install flow.
- Do not include frontmatter counters; voting is DB-owned.
